text.title: QA Bug Bash Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-bug-bash-runbook methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: draft-charters
step.action: Write one charter per persona naming mission + time-box.

step.name: brief-room
step.action: 5-min brief: rubric, where to log findings, observer role.

step.name: run-session
step.action: Testers explore for ≤55 min; observer triages live.

step.name: dedup-pass
step.action: Observer + 1 tester dedupe by title similarity.

step.name: classify
step.action: Tag each finding with sev S0..S3 from the rubric.

step.name: commit-ledger
step.action: Write csv/markdown to release/<id>/bug-bash-ledger; commit + open triage tickets for S0/S1.
